name: Andre Liebenberg
background: Andre has over 30 years of experience in the resources industry. He was previously at BHP where he held various senior roles including Acting President of Energy Coal and Head of Group Investor Relations. Prior to BHP, he was at UBS in London and Old Mutual in South Africa.

company_affiliations.name: Yellow Cake plc
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Chief Executive Officer and Executive Director

company_affiliations.name: BHP Group Limited (formerly BHP Billiton Ltd)
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Various senior executive roles, including CFO of Energy Coal, Acting President of Energy Coal, and Head of Group Investor Relations.
